setupGuide.notes: The 1993 South African GP ran the circuit rebuilt in 1992; AMS2's Kyalami 2019 is the same venue's modern layout, so the historical lap count is kept.

track.realVenue: Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari

setupGuide.notes: The 1988 Imola layout is the same 5.04 km configuration Formula One used through 1994, so it is period-correct for 1993.
Placeholder for Circuit de Nevers Magny-Cours: 72 laps / 306 km reproduced as 73 laps of Le Mans Circuit Bugatti. Keeps the French GP at a French Grand Prix venue.
The 1993 German GP ran Hockenheim with the 1992-revised Ostkurve; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on AMS2's 1988 layout.
AMS2 ships the 2025 Hungaroring; the venue is real and largely unchanged in character since 1986, so the historical lap count is kept.
Suzuka appears in AMS2 as Kansai; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the classic pre-2003 layout.
